text: I'm really frustrated! I tried to update my phone number on my account, but it keeps saying the field is locked. This doesn't make any sense since I should be able to make changes. Can you please help me with this issue?
my app crash when i try to open it. it just close. help!

I would like to address a situation regarding the product I received, as it did not meet the expectations set forth at the time of purchase. However, the details of this issue seem to elude me at the moment, leading to a degree of frustration.
I'm really frustrated because my app keeps crashing, and I can't figure out why. I didn’t change anything and now it's just unusable. Can you help?
I can't believe this happened again. Last time, no one helped, and now... I mean, why is this so hard? Just want a solution.
Hey, my app keeps crashing on the weirdest times like when I'm in the middle of a game. It's super annoying, any idea why? I tried restarting my phone but it just doesn’t help.
I'm really upset! I can't access my account for days now, and I feel like I'm being ignored. Please help me with this issue!
Hey, so I was thinking, is there any chance you guys might ever add a feature that lets me do XYZ with my account? I mean, it's not super common or anything, right? Just curious, you know?

I request a refund for the annual subscription that I mistakenly purchased instead of the monthly one. It is crucial for me to rectify this matter as soon as possible, especially considering my current financial situation and the fact that I intended to select a different option. Thank you for your attention to this urgent matter.

I know this might sound a bit odd, but I've been receiving notifications about an order I never placed, and it’s really starting to bother me. Can you please check and see if this is some kind of mistake? I’d appreciate the help, but it's also kinda frustrating not knowing what's going on.
I tried to use the service, but it keeps failing. I mean, it's like a joke now... last time it worked. so frustrating!!
I can't believe this is happening! My app keeps crashing every time I try to open a new document. I really need help fixing this, but I don’t know what to do next!

Hello there, I hope you’re doing well! I'm currently experiencing an issue where the application seems to be freezing whenever I try to save my progress on a document. This problem has persisted for a few days now, and I’ve already tried restarting my device and reinstalling the app without any success. Any assistance you could provide would be greatly appreciated.
I’m really unhappy with the service I got. It was not what I expected.
